---
title: "Obesity Level Predictive Modeling"
author: "Kaylen Ton"
---

### Load in the data

```{r - packages and data}

library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)

mydata <- read_csv("ObesityData.csv")

```

### Cleaning the data
* Rounding different variables by different decimal places
* Remove un-interpretable variable: HVAC (?)

```{r}

cleaned_data <- mydata %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>% 
  mutate(Age = round(Age, 0))

```

### EDA
For the purpose of variable selection. Correlation matrices (via a heat map maybe?)

# **Modeling**

## Preprocessing

## Feature Engineering

## Fitting Models

## Comparing Models
